rules.gradients: Use subtle radial gradients behind cards or in the background to create 'glow' rather than flat colors. For instance, a soft blue glow behind the active 'Today's Tasks' card.
rules.borders: Linear style borders: mostly 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06). For active/highlighted states, use a gradient border (Tracing Beam effect) transitioning from transparent to #2563EB or #C9A84C.
rules.hover_states: Items should lighten slightly on hover (e.g. bg-white/5) and text should brighten to #FFFFFF. Never rely on color inheritance.
rules.glassmorphism: Used selectively on sticky headers and tooltips: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0F1E]/70 with a 1px border-b border-white/10.

rules.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA standards. Place soft text-shadows on headers if they overlay any glowing background elements.
rules.alignment: Strict left-alignment for all dashboard and data tables. Center alignment is only permitted on the Login hero.

grid_system.dashboard: Bento 'Control Room' Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4) with gap-6. Density is high, utilize full height of cards.
grid_system.marketing_login: Tetris Grid, heavy asymmetry and vast negative space.

containers.border_radius: rounded-lg (max 8px). Avoid overly rounded shapes to maintain the enterprise Linear/Notion feel.

customizations.cards: Remove default heavy shadows. Use flat #13192B backgrounds with 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.06) borders. Inner shadow shadow-[inset_0_1px_0_rgba(255,255,255,0.05)] for a subtle top highlight.
customizations.buttons: Primary: bg-[#2563EB] text-white hover:bg-[#1D4ED8] with ring-2 ring-blue-500/20. Secondary/Ghost: bg-white/5 text-white hover:bg-white/10.
customizations.tables: HR Cohort Table: Notion-style. border-collapse, minimal horizontal borders (border-b border-white/5). text-sm. Hovering a row highlights it subtly.
customizations.progress_rings: Use Recharts or framer-motion SVG circles. Background circle: stroke-white/10. Progress circle: stroke-[#2563EB] or stroke-[#C9A84C] depending on role.
customizations.inputs: bg-[#111626] border-white/10 text-white focus:border-[#2563EB] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#2563EB].
customizations.navigation: Top navigation should be sticky glassmorphism. Left sidebar for HR view should be solid #0A0F1E with subtle right border.

software_engineer.visual_cue: Task cards have a 1px left border of #2563EB. Progress rings and badges glow blue.
software_engineer.iconography: Code, Terminal, Git branches, Server stacks.

marketing_manager.visual_cue: Task cards have a 1px left border of #C9A84C. Progress rings and badges glow gold.
marketing_manager.iconography: Megaphone, Analytics charts, Target audience, Broadcast.

animations.progress_rings: Animate 'strokeDashoffset' from max to target value over 1.5s with an ease-out curve on load.
animations.task_cards: Staggered slide-up: initial opacity-0 translate-y-4, animate to opacity-100 translate-y-0. Stagger children by 0.1s.
animations.hover_effects: Micro-interactions: Cards translate-y-[-2px] with duration-200 ease-out on hover. Buttons scale slightly (0.98 on active).
animations.accessibility: Wrap complex motion in prefers-reduced-motion media query checks.

icons_and_assets.icon_library: @phosphor-icons/react (Weight: Duotone for role badges, Regular for standard UI).

login_background.alt: Abstract dark blue and gold mesh
login_background.usage: Use as a full-screen, low-opacity (20%) background behind the login form to add texture.

icons_and_assets.brand_logo: Render as text: 'Copilot' in Plus Jakarta Sans font-black, with a glowing #2563EB dot '.' at the end. Do not use stock images for the logo.

login.layout: Center-aligned form modal floating over the abstract background image (with heavy vignette/blur).
login.elements: Email, Password, Role selector (SWE vs Marketing), Login button.

onboarding_setup.layout: Bento grid, step-by-step intake. Cards should overlap slightly or use nested borders to look like a high-end IDE config page.

employee_dashboard.layout: Control Room grid. Highlight 'TODAY' natively by making today's task card have a prominent Tracing Beam border.
employee_dashboard.elements: Timeline, Today's Top 3 Tasks (Slide in on scroll), AI Chat Widget (Bottom right, floating, glassmorphic).

plan_90_day.layout: Timeline view with large, animating Progress Rings for 30, 60, and 90 day milestones.

hr_cohort_dashboard.layout: Wide container. Top row: Aggregate stats (Cards). Bottom: Dense Notion-style table.
hr_cohort_dashboard.elements: Status badges (Compliance, Access, Engagement) should be small caps pills with subtle background tints (e.g., bg-green-500/10 text-green-400).

hr_employee_deep_dive.layout: Two columns: 1. Employee stats & signals. 2. Human Override Panel (Form controls to force-complete tasks or trigger nudges).

admin_audit.layout: Monospace typography (Inter or JetBrains Mono if available) for log rows. Strict tabular data.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive elements, buttons, inputs, tabs, and key data points MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='today-task-1', data-testid='progress-ring-30').
